case_title: HONG BIN CHAN et al VS. HENRY HING XUAN HY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.( BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER, HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF PRESENT WITH A FRIEND WHO INTERPRETED FOR HIM. PLAINTIFF REFUSED TO EXCHANGE DOCUMENTS WITH DEFENDANT.
